summary: Comprehensive testing of Piggie Points MVP completed. Backend: 20/20 tests passing (100%). Frontend: All core flows working correctly including registration, login, task completion, rewards, goals, settings, and monitor mode.

minor.issue: Line 19: Uses default value for DB_NAME which violates 'fail fast' principle. Should be: db = client[os.environ['DB_NAME']]

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead
Console warning: TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Use Pressable
Package version warnings: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.1 should be 2.2.0, expo-image-picker@55.0.13 should be ~17.0.10

action_items: Optional: Update server.py line 19 to remove default value for DB_NAME
Optional: Update deprecated shadow* style props to boxShadow (low priority, app works fine)
Optional: Update package versions to match Expo recommendations
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All MongoDB queries properly exclude _id field
✓ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ All text wrapped in Text component
✓ testID attributes present on all interactive elements
✓ Proper error handling and loading states in UI
seed_data_creation: Backend automatically seeds 4 default tasks and 8 default rewards on startup. Test users created with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests cover auth, tasks, rewards, goals, monitor mode, and points. Frontend tests verified registration, login, home dashboard, task completion (manual and timer), rewards spin wheel, goals CRUD, settings customization, and monitor mode with PIN. No critical issues found.

tasks.complete_manual: ✓ Manual task completion working, points updated

points.get_user_points: ✓ Points endpoint returns total, streak, bonus status

frontend_tests.login_screen: ✓ Renders with name/PIN inputs and login button
frontend_tests.registration: ✓ Create account toggle and form submission working

home_dashboard.stats_cards: ✓ Piggie Points and Day Streak cards visible
home_dashboard.tasks_list: ✓ All 4 default tasks visible (Walk, Gym, Wake, Sugar)

task_completion.timer_task: ✓ Timer modal opens for 20 Min Walk

goals_tab.create_goal: ✓ Goal creation modal and form working
goals_tab.goal_display: ✓ Created goal appears in short-term goals list

settings_tab.customization_options: ✓ Add task, add reward, add photo buttons visible

monitor_mode.dashboard: ✓ Shows all test users with points and streaks
